plan.failureSummary: The autonomous agent failed to find the 'Last Name' input field because the survey form layout changed. Visual evidence shows 'Set 2' of questions is active, which does not contain the 'Last Name' field expected by the cached deterministic instructions.
observedIndicators: Deterministic mode was active (cached instructions used)
Failure screenshot shows 'Set 2' of questions which lacks the 'Last Name' field targeted by the tool call
Error message confirms 'Last Name' selector could not be resolved
Historical data shows a high flakiness score (0.77) with frequent recovery on retry
The overallObjective 'Fill out all of the survey questions' is semantically flexible and should adapt to layout changes if the cache is cleared

remediationSteps.summary: Clear page.ai cache and retry test
remediationSteps.details: Execute the test again with the 'clearPageAiCache' directive enabled. This will force the autonomous agent to re-scan the page structure and adapt to the current form fields (Set 2).

remediationSteps.summary: Evaluate disabling deterministic mode for unstable UI
remediationSteps.details: If the survey fields change frequently by design, consider disabling 'DETERMINISTIC' mode for this specific test to allow the agent to always adapt autonomously, or increase the retry count.

plan.notes: The application URL 'unstable-survey-dinoer.replit.app' and the 'Set 2' badge in the screenshot suggest the form is intentionally dynamic or unstable. The deterministic cache is brittle against these changes. Clearing the cache will allow the agent to re-analyze the page and adapt to the current set of questions.
